sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14504" key="a)pro/soptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπρόσ-οπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n14504.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not to be looked at, faced,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀστραπή</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:117" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.117</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
